title: Complete the INSIGHTS v1 module gate
description: Exactly-one final module gate with no Implements ownership; execute clean build, full tests, Native-AOT publication, behavioral gates, graph convergence, private-evidence status, and forbidden-surface checks.
objective: A clean checkout proves INSIGHTS v1 satisfies the approved design and active PRD with no hidden scope, unverified class, partial state, private disclosure, or graph drift.

reason: The final module gate runs only after all contract, behavioral, nonfunctional, use-case, and graph evidence converges.

files.role: clean build, tests, publish, focused gates, graph, and privacy convergence
safe final module evidence and environment fingerprint

text: From a clean checkout, restore, warning-as-error build, full test suite, and linux-x64 self-contained Native-AOT publish complete with zero failures, warnings, trim issues, reflection/dynamic-code gaps, or missing native SQLite artifact.

Every task verification class and every public operation has nonzero discovery; contract, BUDGET seam, private owner-value, recovery, security, performance, six UC, and graph scripts all exit 0 with their exact thresholds.

lex coverage, decision paths, link suggestions, endpoint heuristics, dependency evidence, plan coverage/audit/status, context budgets, graph integrity, and sync match the approved INSIGHTS graph with no unexplained gap or drift.

Static and runtime scans find zero HTTP/FastEndpoints, EF Core, UI, permissions/seeds, scripts/plugins/formula languages, upstream mutation/private access, second LEDGER read, daemon/network/background, floating financial arithmetic, raw member persistence, private receipt persistence, or payload-bearing diagnostics.
The owner-value evidence is a successful aggregate-only gate; if it failed, the module gate remains blocked and reports the do-less outcome rather than accepting persistence or shipment.
git status contains no tracked private evidence or generated runtime artifact and every committed verification document contains safe metadata only.
The final script invokes every focused gate and preserves exact per-class discovery evidence.

Do NOT skip a focused gate because the aggregate suite is green, accept zero-discovery filters, relax warnings or thresholds, suppress graph findings, or mark the module complete after a failed owner-value gate.
Do NOT stage private manifests, reports, databases, WAL/SHM, backups, paths, statement data, merchant text, expected rows, or financial fixtures.
Do NOT add deferred signals, UI, HTTP, hosted services, arbitrary policies, automatic retention/cleanup, or upstream mutation while closing the module.
Execution completion is recorded in br after bead compilation; this planning_state never represents runtime progress.

description: Review clean-checkout evidence, owner-value pass, focused gate outputs, graph state, and tracked-file privacy before completion.

verification_steps.expected_result: exit 0; clean restore/build/full tests and linux-x64 Native-AOT publish succeed with 0 warnings/failures, every focused gate exits 0 with nonzero per-class discovery, 15 of 15 active FRs and all 37 design paths are proven, graph/sync are clean, forbidden-surface and tracked-private-artifact scans are empty, and one safe final report is written
